digest.en: Israel issued forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon. The US and Iranian officials can reportedly talk by phone, with Trump saying Iran can call the US if it wants to negotiate. Tensions rise as Israel and Hezbollah trade strikes in Lebanon.
digest.hi: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में आर्थिक युद्ध की स्थिति बनी हुई है। ट्रंप की डिनर पार्टी में फायरिंग की घटना सामने आई है, जिस पर दुनिया भर के नेताओं ने प्रतिक्रिया दी। इस घटना के बाद सुरक्षा को लेकर सवाल उठ रहे हैं।

articles.title: Israel issues forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon in escalation
articles.summary: Israel issued forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon after PM Benjamin Netanyahu accused Hezbollah of undermining the ceasefire. Hezbollah rejects allegations from Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu that it is undermining the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

articles.title: Trump says US shooting suspect wrote anti-Christian manifesto, called himself a ‘Friendly Federal
articles.summary: Trump stated a US shooting suspect wrote an anti-Christian manifesto and called himself a Friendly Federal. Trump says US shooting suspect wrote anti-Christian manifesto, called himself a ‘Friendly Federal.

articles.title: Trump says U.S., Iranian officials can talk by phone
articles.summary: Trump expressed disappointment in NATO and suggested the US may consider leaving the military alliance. Asked about NATO, Mr. Trump said he was “very, very disappointed” in the military alliance, which he has suggested the U. S.

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call U.S. if it wants to negotiate
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi discussed security in the Strait of Hormuz with Oman officials. Iran FM back in Pakistan after Oman visit, says report; Iran's Foreign ​Minister Abbas Araghchi ‌held talks in ​Oman, discussed security ‌in the Strait of Hormuz, ‌broader ⁠Gulf waters, ⁠and diplomatic efforts to end the ​Iran-U. S.

articles.title: 10 Minutes Before Firing At Trump Event, Shooter Sent A Manifesto To Family
articles.summary: The Trump event shooter sent a manifesto to family 10 minutes before firing, prompting his brother to raise the alarm. It was Allen's brother who first raised the alarm. 10 Minutes Before Firing At Trump Event, Shooter Sent A Manifesto To Family.

articles.title: Trump Event Shooter's Manifesto Spares FBI Chief Kash Patel From Hit List
articles.summary: A shooter was taken into custody after running through a security checkpoint at a Trump event. Allen was taken into custody after police said he ran through a security checkpoint.

articles.title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
articles.summary: Authorities believe the suspect in the press dinner shooting targeted Trump and officials. The suspect will be charged with assault and using a firearm during a crime. The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.

articles.title: Trump Event Shooter Mocked Hotel Security In Manifesto, Said 'Won't Use Slugs'
articles.summary: Trump stated the shooter acted alone as a "lone wolf". The suspect had mocked hotel security in a manifesto. Trump said officials believed he acted alone and was what he called a "lone wolf".

articles.title: Trump makes a fresh case for White House ballroom after shooting incident at dinner event
articles.summary: Trump made a case for a White House ballroom after a shooting at a dinner event. He slammed a petitioner in a related case. Mr. Trump slammed the petitioner in the case, contending that she had absolutely no standing to bring such a suit and it must be dropped immediately.

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U.S. envoys' trip canceled
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister returned to Pakistan after a US envoy trip was canceled. Live Updates: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S. envoys' trip canceled CBS News. Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S.

articles.title: Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War
articles.summary: Xi Jinping proposed Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War. The initiatives were outlined in an article on Modern Diplomacy. Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War Modern Diplomacy.

articles.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
articles.summary: Israel's President Isaac Herzog will not pardon Benjamin Netanyahu. Instead, he will seek a plea deal in Netanyahu's corruption case. President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

articles.title: As Kash Patel's Past Catches Up, Report Hints At Trump Axe
articles.summary: Kash Patel's past use of FBI resources has raised separate questions, hinting at potential repercussions from the Trump administration. Separate questions have also been raised about Patel's use of FBI resources.

articles.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi continued diplomatic efforts over the weekend, but US President Donald Trump scrapped a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, casting doubt on US-Iran peace hopes. The stalemate risks escalating tensions without a deal.

articles.title: Let's Not Forget Those Thieves: Pope Leo On Forces That Wage War
articles.summary: Pope Leo issued a warning about the use of nuclear power on the Chernobyl anniversary, highlighting the destructive forces of war. Pope Leo issued a warning about the use of nuclear power on the anniversary of the Chernobyl accident.

articles.title: Trump Again Asks Iran To Call US For Negotiations
articles.summary: Trump has asked Iran to initiate peace negotiations with the US, a request made in a recent statement. Trump ask Iran to dial the US for peace negotiations. (File). Trump Again Asks Iran To Call US For Negotiations.

articles.title: Trump’s Lincoln reference over repeated violent incidents
articles.summary: Trump referenced Lincoln in response to repeated violent incidents, drawing a historical parallel to the US president's leadership. Trump’s Lincoln reference over repeated violent incidents.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'We have all the cards', Trump says Iran can 'call
articles.summary: Iran shared a framework to end the war with Pakistan as the US holds back its envoy. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran shares 'workable framework' with Pak on ending war as US holds back envoy for talks The Times of India.

articles.title: Russia, North Korea agree 'long-term' military cooperation
articles.summary: Russia and North Korea have agreed on long-term military cooperation, with a defense deal and memorial inauguration marking the agreement. Russia's defense minister and the chairman of the State Duma are both visiting North Korea.

articles.title: Syrian court begins proceedings against Assad and allies
articles.summary: A Syrian court started proceedings against President Bashar al-Assad, his brother Maher, and others for alleged war crimes. Assad and his brother fled Syria and will be tried in absentia, while former security official Atef Najib appeared in handcuffs.

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा
articles.summary: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में आर्थिक युद्ध की स्थिति बन गई है। यह क्षेत्र महत्वपूर्ण है क्योंकि यहां से बहुत सारा तेल और गैस का व्यापार होता है। विचार: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा Jagran।

articles.title: रघु राय ने जब बताया था कि 'फ़ोटोग्राफ़र नहीं होता तो माली होता'
articles.summary: प्रसिद्ध फोटोग्राफर रघु राय ने एक बार कहा था कि अगर वह फोटोग्राफर नहीं होते तो वह माली होते. उनकी नज़र में देश की मिट्टी की सुगंध में काम करना दुनिया में कहीं नहीं मिल सकता.

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर कर सकते हैं बात; फिर नाटो पर भड़के अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर बात कर सकते हैं। इसके बाद उन्होंने नाटो पर टिप्पणी की और कहा कि यह संगठन पुराना हो गया है। ट्रंप की टिप्पणियों से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम होने की संभावना है।

articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।
